flow.name: list-customers-flow
flow.doc:name: List Customers Flow
flow.doc:description: Returns the full list of all customers from seeded mock data

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers
http:listener.doc:description: Receives GET requests to list all customers

ee:transform.doc:name: Load customers from mock data
ee:transform.doc:description: Reads all customers from the seeded customers.json resource file

logger.doc:name: Log list customers
logger.doc:description: Logs the number of customers returned

flow.name: get-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: Get Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Returns a single customer record by ID from seeded mock data, or 404 if not found

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Receives GET requests to retrieve a specific customer by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the customerId URI parameter into a flow variable

ee:transform.doc:name: Find customer by ID
ee:transform.doc:description: Filters the customers mock data to find the customer matching the requested ID

choice.doc:name: Customer found?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the customer ID exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Customer ID does not match any seeded record

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the customer was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Customer with ID '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

set-variable.doc:name: Set 200 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 200 OK

logger.doc:name: Log get customer
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the customer lookup

flow.name: create-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: Create Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Creates a new customer record and returns the created resource with a generated ID

http:listener.doc:name: POST /customers
http:listener.doc:description: Receives POST requests to create a new customer

ee:transform.doc:name: Build created customer response
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs the created customer object with a generated ID and timestamp, echoing input fields

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::UUID --- { id: "c" ++ ((randomUUID() splitBy "-")[0]), name: payload.name, email: payload.email, phone: payload.phone default null, status: "ACTIVE", createdAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"} }

set-variable.doc:name: Set 201 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 201 Created

logger.doc:name: Log create customer
logger.doc:description: Logs the ID of the newly created customer

flow.name: update-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: Update Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Updates an existing customer record by ID and returns the updated resource, or 404 if not found

http:listener.doc:name: PUT /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Receives PUT requests to update an existing customer by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the customerId URI parameter into a flow variable

set-variable.doc:name: Store request payload
set-variable.doc:description: Preserves the incoming request payload before customer lookup

ee:transform.doc:name: Check customer exists
ee:transform.doc:description: Verifies the customer ID exists in the mock data before applying the update

choice.doc:name: Customer exists?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the customer ID to update exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Customer ID does not exist, return 404

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the customer to update was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Customer with ID '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:name: Found — apply update
otherwise.doc:description: Customer exists, merge incoming fields and return updated record

ee:transform.doc:name: Merge update into customer
ee:transform.doc:description: Merges the incoming request fields onto the existing customer record, preserving id and createdAt

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: vars.customerId, name: vars.requestPayload.name default payload.name, email: vars.requestPayload.email default payload.email, phone: vars.requestPayload.phone default payload.phone default null, status: vars.requestPayload.status default payload.status default "ACTIVE", createdAt: payload.createdAt, updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"} }

set-variable.doc:name: Set 200 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 200 OK

logger.doc:name: Log update customer
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the customer update operation

flow.name: delete-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: Delete Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Deletes a customer record by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success, 404 if not found. Business rule enforcement (no orders) is handled by the process layer.

http:listener.doc:name: DELETE /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Receives DELETE requests to remove a customer by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the customerId URI parameter into a flow variable

ee:transform.doc:name: Check customer exists
ee:transform.doc:description: Verifies the customer ID exists in mock data before performing the delete

choice.doc:name: Customer exists?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the customer ID to delete exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Customer ID does not exist, return 404

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the customer to delete was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Customer with ID '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:description: Customer found, simulate deletion and return 204 No Content

set-variable.doc:name: Set 204 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 204 No Content

set-payload.doc:name: Empty response body
set-payload.doc:description: Sets empty payload for 204 No Content response

logger.doc:name: Log delete customer
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the customer delete operation
